summary: Full Phase 1 implementation plan for the Sierra Blu Realty PropTech transformation. Covers: current codebase audit (what stays vs. what changes), integration conflict analysis, bilingual i18n strategy, Property Finder sync layer upgrade, Firestore data model expansion, single-logo branding, 30-day sprint timeline with 4 weekly milestones, and detailed SOP documentation plan. Includes a risk matrix for each proposed change and the decision to preserve the existing CSS design system while layering Tailwind utilities.
